title: gymnacranthera maliliensis
intro: Gymnacranthera maliliensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Myristicaceae, native to New Guinea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gymnacranthera maliliensis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and sometimes used in herbal remedies to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
